aliases: NATO bombing of the Federal Republic of Yugoslavia
family_summary: NATO air campaign against the Federal Republic of Yugoslavia from March to June 1999. This bundle keeps one campaign-level NATO-on-FRY episode because both the strongest civilian casualty series and the strongest force-exposure evidence are campaign-wide.
notes: Episode end date is set to 1999-06-09 to align with the 78-day HRW civilian incident frame, while noting that some commemorative sources place the final strike on 1999-06-10.
